name: Financial Planner
metaDescription: 6-step financial planning wizard. Profile, income, goals, insurance, gap analysis, and action plan. No PII collected.

faq.question: How does the financial planner work?
faq.answer: It follows the CFP Board's 6-step process: gather your profile, analyze income/expenses, set goals, review insurance, identify gaps, and create an action plan. No personal data is collected — only ranges and brackets.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: All computations run in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server. We use income brackets, not exact amounts. No PII is collected.

faq.question: What goals can I plan for?
faq.answer: Emergency fund, home purchase, education, marriage, retirement, car, travel, and health fund. Each goal has a target amount, timeline, and priority level.

howToSteps.name: Set your profile
howToSteps.text: Choose life stage and dependents — no exact ages needed

howToSteps.name: Enter income bracket
howToSteps.text: Select income range and savings rate

howToSteps.name: Add financial goals
howToSteps.text: Set target amounts, timelines, and priorities for each goal

howToSteps.name: See gap analysis
howToSteps.text: Find where your savings fall short
